title: AuditEvent
description: Schema for audit events generated by the URL parsing function.
$comment: This schema defines the structure of audit events for URL parsing operations, including both successful parses and errors.

operation.description: Operation identifier for the audit event.

raw_url.description: Redacted or sanitized URL string safe for logging.

host.description: Host extracted from the parsed URL, or null if unavailable.

error_type.description: Name of the exception class, or null if no error occurred.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code, or null if not provided.

correlation_id.description: Optional correlation identifier for cross-system tracing.
